case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. TOMONS DESIGN ENGINEERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF
